title: neolacis riedelii
intro: Neolacis riedelii, also known as the "Tree of Life" or "Kino Tree", is a medicinal plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful for treating a variety of ailments. The health benefits of Neolacis riedelii include relief from fever, sore throats, and skin irritations, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce the risk of infection. Neolacis riedelii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
